chunks.text: In another five years, what will I accomplish?
Will I have reached my goal?
My ambition is not great, but I hope to contribute quietly to this life.
Perhaps, five years from now, I will have found a little of my pursuit.
Daily progress will have quietly become a single path.
By then I will have gathered many small achievement
and I will have been seeking many things.
My courage will have been growing in small forms.
I will have become a little more mature.
A grand prospect is not always needed.
I want to be someone who can fulfill small goals.
My beyond will likely be opening quietly there, and I do believe that now.
